result.stdout:
Description:
  Andy RBAC CLI - Manage applications, roles, teams, and users

Usage:
  andy-rbac [command] [options]

Options:
  -u, --api-url <api-url>        RBAC API base URL (or set ANDY_RBAC_URL environment variable) [default: http://localhost:5000]
  -k, --api-key <api-key>        API key for authentication (or set ANDY_RBAC_API_KEY environment variable) []
  -o, --output <Csv|Json|Table>  Output format (table, json, csv) [default: Table]
  --version                      Show version information
  -?, -h, --help                 Show help and usage information

Commands:
  app      Manage applications
  role     Manage roles
  team     Manage teams
  user     Manage users
  check    Check permissions
  version  Show version information

commands.payload:
Description:
  Andy RBAC CLI - Manage applications, roles, teams, and users

Usage:
  andy-rbac [command] [options]

Options:
  -u, --api-url <api-url>        RBAC API base URL (or set ANDY_RBAC_URL environment variable) [default: http://localhost:5000]
  -k, --api-key <api-key>        API key for authentication (or set ANDY_RBAC_API_KEY environment variable) []
  -o, --output <Csv|Json|Table>  Output format (table, json, csv) [default: Table]
  --version                      Show version information
  -?, -h, --help                 Show help and usage information

Commands:
  app      Manage applications
  role     Manage roles
  team     Manage teams
  user     Manage users
  check    Check permissions
  version  Show version information

result.stdout:
Description:
  Manage applications

Usage:
  andy-rbac app [command] [options]

Options:
  -u, --api-url <api-url>        RBAC API base URL (or set ANDY_RBAC_URL environment variable) [default: http://localhost:5000]
  -k, --api-key <api-key>        API key for authentication (or set ANDY_RBAC_API_KEY environment variable) []
  -o, --output <Csv|Json|Table>  Output format (table, json, csv) [default: Table]
  -?, -h, --help                 Show help and usage information

Commands:
  list                                        List all applications
  get <code>                                  Get application details
  create <code> <name>                        Create a new application
  delete <code>                               Delete an application
  add-resource-type <app-code> <code> <name>  Add a resource type to an application

result.stdout:
Description:
  Add a resource type to an application

Usage:
  andy-rbac app add-resource-type <app-code> <code> <name> [options]

Arguments:
  <app-code>  Application code
  <code>      Resource type code
  <name>      Display name

Options:
  --no-instances                 Resource type does not support instances
  -u, --api-url <api-url>        RBAC API base URL (or set ANDY_RBAC_URL environment variable) [default: http://localhost:5000]
  -k, --api-key <api-key>        API key for authentication (or set ANDY_RBAC_API_KEY environment variable) []
  -o, --output <Csv|Json|Table>  Output format (table, json, csv) [default: Table]
  -?, -h, --help                 Show help and usage information

commands.payload:
Description:

Description:
  Check permissions

Usage:
  andy-rbac check [command] [options]

Options:
  -u, --api-url <api-url>        RBAC API base URL (or set ANDY_RBAC_URL environment variable) [default: http://localhost:5000]
  -k, --api-key <api-key>        API key for authentication (or set ANDY_RBAC_API_KEY environment variable) []

  -?, -h, --help                 Show help and usage information

Commands:
  permission <user> <permission>  Check if a user has a permission
  list-permissions <user>         List all permissions for a user

result.stdout:
Description:
  Check if a user has a permission

Usage:
  andy-rbac check permission <user> <permission> [options]

Arguments:
  <user>        User external ID
  <permission>  Permission code (e.g., andy-docs:document:read)

Options:
  -r, --resource <resource>      Resource instance ID
  -u, --api-url <api-url>        RBAC API base URL (or set ANDY_RBAC_URL environment variable) [default: http://localhost:5000]
  -k, --api-key <api-key>        API key for authentication (or set ANDY_RBAC_API_KEY environment variable) []
  -o, --output <Csv|Json|Table>  Output format (table, json, csv) [default: Table]
  -?, -h, --help                 Show help and usage information

result.stdout:
Description:
  Manage roles

Usage:
  andy-rbac role [command] [options]

Options:
  -u, --api-url <api-url>        RBAC API base URL (or set ANDY_RBAC_URL environment variable) [default: http://localhost:5000]
  -k, --api-key <api-key>        API key for authentication (or set ANDY_RBAC_API_KEY environment variable) []
  -o, --output <Csv|Json|Table>  Output format (table, json, csv) [default: Table]
  -?, -h, --help                 Show help and usage information

Commands:
  list                  List all roles
  get <code>            Get role details
  create <code> <name>  Create a new role
  delete <code>         Delete a role
  assign <role> <user>  Assign a role to a user
  revoke <role> <user>  Revoke a role from a user

commands.payload:

  -?, -h, --help                 Show help and usage information

  list                  List all roles
  get <code>            Get role details
  create <code> <name>  Create a new role
  delete <code>         Delete a role
  assign <role> <user>  Assign a role to a user
  revoke <role> <user>  Revoke a role from a user

result.stdout:
Description:
  Assign a role to a user

Usage:
  andy-rbac role assign <role> <user> [options]

Arguments:
  <role>  Role code
  <user>  User external ID

Options:
  -r, --resource <resource>      Resource instance ID to scope the assignment
  -u, --api-url <api-url>        RBAC API base URL (or set ANDY_RBAC_URL environment variable) [default: http://localhost:5000]
  -k, --api-key <api-key>        API key for authentication (or set ANDY_RBAC_API_KEY environment variable) []
  -o, --output <Csv|Json|Table>  Output format (table, json, csv) [default: Table]
  -?, -h, --help                 Show help and usage information

result.stdout:
Description:
  Create a new role

Usage:
  andy-rbac role create <code> <name> [options]

Arguments:
  <code>  Unique role code
  <name>  Display name

Options:
  -a, --app <app>                  Application code (omit for global role)
  -p, --parent <parent>            Parent role code for inheritance
  -d, --description <description>  Description
  -u, --api-url <api-url>          RBAC API base URL (or set ANDY_RBAC_URL environment variable) [default: http://localhost:5000]
  -k, --api-key <api-key>          API key for authentication (or set ANDY_RBAC_API_KEY environment variable) []
  -o, --output <Csv|Json|Table>    Output format (table, json, csv) [default: Table]

result.stdout:
Description:
  Manage teams

Usage:
  andy-rbac team [command] [options]

Options:
  -u, --api-url <api-url>        RBAC API base URL (or set ANDY_RBAC_URL environment variable) [default: http://localhost:5000]
  -k, --api-key <api-key>        API key for authentication (or set ANDY_RBAC_API_KEY environment variable) []
  -o, --output <Csv|Json|Table>  Output format (table, json, csv) [default: Table]
  -?, -h, --help                 Show help and usage information

Commands:
  list                         List all teams
  get <code>                   Get team details
  create <code> <name>         Create a new team
  add-member <team> <user>     Add a member to a team
  remove-member <team> <user>  Remove a member from a team
  assign-role <team> <role>    Assign a role to a team (all members inherit)

commands.payload:
Description:
  Manage teams

Usage:
  andy-rbac team [command] [options]

Options:
  -u, --api-url <api-url>        RBAC API base URL (or set ANDY_RBAC_URL environment variable) [default: http://localhost:5000]
  -k, --api-key <api-key>        API key for authentication (or set ANDY_RBAC_API_KEY environment variable) []
  -o, --output <Csv|Json|Table>  Output format (table, json, csv) [default: Table]
  -?, -h, --help                 Show help and usage information

Commands:
  list                         List all teams
  get <code>                   Get team details
  create <code> <name>         Create a new team
  add-member <team> <user>     Add a member to a team
  remove-member <team> <user>  Remove a member from a team
  assign-role <team> <role>    Assign a role to a team (all members inherit)

result.stdout:
Description:
  Add a member to a team

Usage:
  andy-rbac team add-member <team> <user> [options]

Arguments:
  <team>  Team code
  <user>  User external ID

Options:
  -p, --provider <provider>      Identity provider [default: andy-auth]
  -r, --role <role>              Membership role (Member, Admin, Owner) [default: Member]
  -u, --api-url <api-url>        RBAC API base URL (or set ANDY_RBAC_URL environment variable) [default: http://localhost:5000]
  -k, --api-key <api-key>        API key for authentication (or set ANDY_RBAC_API_KEY environment variable) []
  -o, --output <Csv|Json|Table>  Output format (table, json, csv) [default: Table]
  -?, -h, --help                 Show help and usage information

commands.payload:
Description:
  Add a member to a team

Usage:
  andy-rbac team add-member <team> <user> [options]

Arguments:
  <team>  Team code
  <user>  User external ID

Options:
  -p, --provider <provider>      Identity provider [default: andy-auth]
  -r, --role <role>              Membership role (Member, Admin, Owner) [default: Member]
  -u, --api-url <api-url>        RBAC API base URL (or set ANDY_RBAC_URL environment variable) [default: http://localhost:5000]
  -k, --api-key <api-key>        API key for authentication (or set ANDY_RBAC_API_KEY environment variable) []
  -o, --output <Csv|Json|Table>  Output format (table, json, csv) [default: Table]
  -?, -h, --help                 Show help and usage information

result.stdout:
Description:
  Assign a role to a team (all members inherit)

Usage:
  andy-rbac team assign-role <team> <role> [options]

Arguments:
  <team>  Team code
  <role>  Role code

Options:
  -u, --api-url <api-url>        RBAC API base URL (or set ANDY_RBAC_URL environment variable) [default: http://localhost:5000]
  -k, --api-key <api-key>        API key for authentication (or set ANDY_RBAC_API_KEY environment variable) []
  -o, --output <Csv|Json|Table>  Output format (table, json, csv) [default: Table]
  -?, -h, --help                 Show help and usage information
